title: NQBlade Backtest 2021-2026
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext:
Backtest of NQBlade from 2021 to 2026 on NAS100.

This test covers multiple years and different market conditions, giving a broader view of how the bot performs over time instead of showing only a short favorable period. It includes trending phases, volatile sessions, and more difficult conditions, which makes the results more meaningful when evaluating consistency and behavior.

NQBlade is a rule-based NAS100 bot built around trend-following logic, higher-timeframe confirmation, volatility filters, and structured risk management. The goal is to focus on cleaner setups and controlled execution rather than random entries.

If you’re interested and want more details, feel free to message me.
